name: Maple Glazed Pork Chops with Whiskey Buttered Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce pan drippings from pork chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the pork chops in maple syrup and mark them with an X pattern on both sides.
2. Place the chops in a pan with 1 ounce of water and remaining syrup, then cook until done (about 10 minutes). Brush with more syrup as needed to glaze.
3. Whip together mashed potatoes, cheddar cheese, and cook carrots for 5 minutes or until al dente.
4. Add apples to the carrots and cook for 1 minute. Drain excess water and toss in butter and tarragon.
5. Place potatoes on a plate and rest pork chops on top of them.
6. Alternate placing carrots and apples around the chops.
7. Spoon Whiskey Buttered Applesauce over the top and garnish with chopped sage.
Whiskey Buttered Applesauce
